steps.title: Set equations equal and rearrange
steps.content:
Since both expressions equal $y$:
$$x + 8 = x^2 + 14x + 48$$
Rearranging to standard form by moving all terms to one side:
$$x^2 + 13x + 40 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and find the greatest solution
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to 40 and add to 13: these are 5 and 8.
$$(x + 5)(x + 8) = 0$$
This gives $x = -5$ or $x = -8$. The greatest of these two solutions is $-5$. A is correct.
